TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O pifoting no Pangcah == Ano maherek ko rohef, ano caay ka saan, ano maherek ko kalipahakan a romi'ad, caay kaeca mifoting ko Pangcah. Inian a pifoting 'i, PAKELANG han no Pangcah. Deng o Fata'an ato Tafalong ko Mali'alac sanay to i rarikoray no kalipahakan a romi'ad, pakelang saan to i rarikoray no kararoman a romi'ad a pifoting. Ano pakelang to ano mali'alac to i, malecaday to a palosiyang to nika o maherekay to ko paysin. Orasaka, o miliyasayto to kapaysinan a demak, o micomodayto to kalo'orip no tamdaw, sanay ko heci nonini demak. Caay ko futing a cecay ko mamaala i nanom, o toko, o fidac , o takora'ay, manga'ay to a maala. Dengan o fa'inayan a cecay ko lalomowad a mifutig. I loma' ko fafahiyan a mitifek, ano caay ka saan, midemak to no fafahiyan a tayal i loma'. No saki tini no finawlan a pifuting i, miladis han ko no 'Amis. Misacepo' han ko no pasawali. Komoris han ko no i lawacay no tarawadaw. Orasaka, itiniay i tarawadaw a lomowad ko komoris hananay a rayray no demak a mifuting.
S.PHON: == o~u pifo~utiŋ no~u paŋʦaħ == ano~u maħərək ko~u ro~uħəf, ano~u ʦaaj ka saan, ano~u maħərək ko~u kaɾipaħakan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj kaəʦa mifo~utiŋ ko~u paŋʦaħ. inian a pifo~utiŋ ʡi, pakəɾan* ħan no~u paŋʦaħ. ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u fataʡan ato~u tafaɾo~uŋ ko~u maɾiʡaɾaʦ sanaj to~u i rariko~uraj no~u kaɾipaħakan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pakəɾaŋ saan to~u i rariko~uraj no~u kararo~uman a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a pifo~utiŋ. ano~u pakəɾaŋ to~u ano~u maɾiʡaɾaʦ to~u i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u a paɾo~usijaŋ to~u nika o~u maħərəkaj to~u ko~u pajsin. o~urasaka, o~u miɾijasajto~u to~u kapajsinan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮajto~u to~u kaɾo~uʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, sanaj ko~u ħəʦi no~unini ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦaaj ko~u fo~u~utiŋ a ʦəʦaj ko~u mamaaɾa i nano~um, o~u to~uko~u, o~u fiɬ~ɮaʦ , o~u tako~uraʡaj, maŋaʡaj to~u a maaɾa. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u faʡinajan a ʦəʦaj ko~u ɾaɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ a mifo~u~uti*. i ɾo~umaʡ ko~u fafaħijan a mitifək, ano~u ʦaaj ka saan, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u no~u fafaħijan a tajaɾ i ɾo~umaʡ. no~u saki tini no~u finawɾan a pifo~u~utiŋ i, miɾaɬ~ɮis ħan ko~u no~u ʡamis. misaʦəpo~uʡ ħan ko~u no~u pasawaɾi. ko~umo~uris ħan ko~u no~u i ɾawaʦaj no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw. o~urasaka, itiniaj i tarawaɬ~ɮaw a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u ko~umo~uris ħananaj a rajraj no~u ɬ~ɮəmak a mifo~u~utiŋ.
S.FORM: == O pifoting no Pangcah == Ano maherek ko rohef, ano caay ka saan, ano maherek ko kalipahakan a romi'ad, caay kaeca mifoting ko Pangcah. Inian a pifoting 'i, PAKELANG han no Pangcah. Deng o Fata'an ato Tafalong ko Mali'alac sanay to i rarikoray no kalipahakan a romi'ad, pakelang saan to i rarikoray no kararoman a romi'ad a pifoting. Ano pakelang to ano mali'alac to i, malecaday to a palosiyang to nika o maherekay to ko paysin. Orasaka, o miliyasayto to kapaysinan a demak, o micomodayto to kalo'orip no tamdaw, sanay ko heci nonini demak. Caay ko futing a cecay ko mamaala i nanom, o toko, o fidac , o takora'ay, manga'ay to a maala. Dengan o fa'inayan a cecay ko lalomowad a mifutig. I loma' ko fafahiyan a mitifek, ano caay ka saan, midemak to no fafahiyan a tayal i loma'. No saki tini no finawlan a pifuting i, miladis han ko no 'Amis. Misacepo' han ko no pasawali. Komoris han ko no i lawacay no tarawadaw. Orasaka, itiniay i tarawadaw a lomowad ko komoris hananay a rayray no demak a mifuting.
S.PHON: == o~u pifo~utiŋ no~u paŋʦaħ == ano~u maħərək ko~u ro~uħəf, ano~u ʦaaj ka saan, ano~u maħərək ko~u kaɾipaħakan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj kaəʦa mifo~utiŋ ko~u paŋʦaħ. inian a pifo~utiŋ ʡi, pakəɾan* ħan no~u paŋʦaħ. ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u fataʡan ato~u tafaɾo~uŋ ko~u maɾiʡaɾaʦ sanaj to~u i rariko~uraj no~u kaɾipaħakan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, pakəɾaŋ saan to~u i rariko~uraj no~u kararo~uman a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a pifo~utiŋ. ano~u pakəɾaŋ to~u ano~u maɾiʡaɾaʦ to~u i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u a paɾo~usijaŋ to~u nika o~u maħərəkaj to~u ko~u pajsin. o~urasaka, o~u miɾijasajto~u to~u kapajsinan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮajto~u to~u kaɾo~uʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, sanaj ko~u ħəʦi no~unini ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦaaj ko~u fo~u~utiŋ a ʦəʦaj ko~u mamaaɾa i nano~um, o~u to~uko~u, o~u fiɬ~ɮaʦ , o~u tako~uraʡaj, maŋaʡaj to~u a maaɾa. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u faʡinajan a ʦəʦaj ko~u ɾaɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ a mifo~u~uti*. i ɾo~umaʡ ko~u fafaħijan a mitifək, ano~u ʦaaj ka saan, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u no~u fafaħijan a tajaɾ i ɾo~umaʡ. no~u saki tini no~u finawɾan a pifo~u~utiŋ i, miɾaɬ~ɮis ħan ko~u no~u ʡamis. misaʦəpo~uʡ ħan ko~u no~u pasawaɾi. ko~umo~uris ħan ko~u no~u i ɾawaʦaj no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw. o~urasaka, itiniaj i tarawaɬ~ɮaw a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u ko~umo~uris ħananaj a rajraj no~u ɬ~ɮəmak a mifo~u~utiŋ.
